RemediationStrings.Title: DisableWindowsConsumerFeatures (Administrative Templates - Experience)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CloudContent\DisableWindowsConsumerFeatures must be 1. Severity: Low. Category: Administrative Templates - Experience.

RemediationStrings.Title: AllowGameDVR (Administrative Templates - Experience)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\GameDVR\AllowGameDVR must be 0. Severity: Low. Category: Administrative Templates - Experience.

RemediationStrings.Title: DisableThirdPartySuggestions (Administrative Templates - Experience)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKU\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CloudContent\DisableThirdPartySuggestions must be 1. Severity: Low. Category: Administrative Templates - Experience.
